reviews.review_title: Zero stars if I could. App is unuseable.
reviews.review_description: On the Quest 3, the screen goes black every time an ad plays, and even when the movie resumes, nothing is visible. I have to exit and re-enter to fix it. Yet another garbage product from Amazon.

reviews.review_title: Great app but some hidden features
reviews.review_description: This is a great addition to my library.  A lot of the recent review say that they took away theater mode, but this is not the case. In order to activate it, you have to go to the top right corner of the screen and the option for full screen appears. This activates theater mode. I was able to watch my movies and TV shows in my home environment with everything dimmed down. It took a while to figure out how to do it.  If you want and use Amazon prime in vr, then this is the app for you. The review lost a star because it was not very obvious on how to activate theater mode. Maybe the company should be more explicit in explaining these features.  Hope this review helps people thinking of trying this out.

I think chatgpt would write better app for watching movies than this app. It's complete disaster and garbage. Even players in year 2000 had more options and better experience than this... and there was no vr...
I only  hear audio, the video doesn't actually play

reviews.review_title: No More Watch Party or Alternative
reviews.review_description:
Bought another Meta Quest 3 so my wife and I could enjoy things together, including movies. However, it appears there is no longer any way to do this with the Prime Video app.

Reeeeeally starting to genuinely hate absolutely everything about Amazing across the board. Slowly worsening Alexa, worse and worse customer service through Prime, less and less choice or reason to keep using them.
No easy way to find VR content now that prime vr app is gone, if they add it I would gladly give it more stars

reviews.review_title: just use the Quest's theater mode...
reviews.review_description:
Removing theater mode was the right choice, now that the Quest OS comes with exactly the same thing for any windowed app, so I have the same experience with all apps.

I was not fond of the busy background of the old app (with cars zooming around everywhere and ambience sounds) that took ages to start up, so removing that was a good choice in my eyes as well.

Haven't used the new app for very long yet, so my only gripe is some inconvenience with Downloads. One episode got stuck and prevented all others from downloading, another season had only half the episodes in my chosen language and I had to re-start those manually (instead of getting asked "hey, is there another language we should fall back to?").
In both cases there was no system notification, I had to go looking for their progress to notice there were issues.

Loved that they updated this app and added downloads, which are perfect for when I travel.  High quality stream when saved could be higher, and I'd much prefer 4K when available, but they are way ahead of Disney and Netflix in terms of ability to watch content on the Quest.  Also allows for downloads from subscriptions purchased within Prime account (e.g. Paramount).  Also need a theater mode but assume that is coming!  Recommend...
Please add 4K download

where is the theatre mode ? Why can't I watch  a movie in full screen, black border in full immersion like in the PrimeVR app ?
Seriously guy, you suck so much !
Working great for me so far…watched some things out of my prime library and some prime membership stuff.  Switched to using BigScreen app though because it’s like being in a movie theatre…fun!!

Might as well just turn on the TV and Roku and watch Amazon there. Small screen just floats on the wall. Old one was immersive and you felt like you were in a large screening room. This is such a disappointing downgrade.
Without the movie theater immersion, what’s the point of watching something on a VR headset? Whoever decided this was an improvement should be fired. ￼
Not only was theater more taken away, there is no full screen mode and now there are ads in everything you watch.

reviews.review_title: Used to be my favorite app
reviews.review_description:
I used to love the movie theater in prime video it was one of my favorite features of the app made me feel like I was an an actual movie theater when watching a show or movie, but now I’m just sat in my home area watching on a floating screen. 

I have no idea what’s going on with meta and why they’ve downgraded or discontinued so many good apps and games. I hope they learn from our criticisms and do better in the future

And for those who want an alternative for this app, “Bigscreen” has a prime video player and different environments to watch movies and shows.

reviews.review_title: Why was it necessary to ruin this?
reviews.review_description: I loved my own theater. That's gone.  Hate this app now, thanks a lot. You've screwed Amazon video, you've screwed Netflix and you make no comment to any of these reviews that people have written. Do you even care what people are saying? It would appear not.

All I can say is this was a very, very poor decision. They took one of the best things about prime video VR and turned it into a little screen in a room.

Prime VR had an awsome home page, with stuff flying around in a town square, not to mention when watching stiff you had a huge screen in movie theater setting!

Everything and I mean EVERYTHING about prime video is worse than Prime VR, do not recommend even installing it. Straight 🗑🗑🗑

Horrible update. The best part was the theatre experience, and that’s gone now.  

Thankfully, Bigscreen app has added the ability to watch Prime natively, and their theatre experience is amazing.  

This app is now useless. Delete and install Bigscreen instead.

I don’t get the bad ratings. I love everything about this minimal experience:

• Perfect pass-through dimmed watching environment. I can be in my favourite chair, watching something on a large beautiful rounded screen.

• Intuitive interface, stripped of distractions. I could go from launching to watching in seconds.

What more can you possibly need?

To start I don’t believe it’s entirely the fault of the app, however, the background home screen music follows you no matter where you are in the app, if it’s browsing or full screen films so it completely takes away from the experience. 

Going on from that the quality is shocking, so the two things combined makes anything absolutely unwatchable.

One simple word, “DELETE” and cancel PRIME.

I don’t want to watch commercials, especially on VR. I’ll CANCEL PRIME and watch the videos without ads 😁

The “upgrade” seems to have removed the major feature(s) that made it worth using?  It no longer looks as if you are in a theater. There are just floating windows with either a dark background or that annoying/distracting one. I’ll just go back to watching on  my phone or my tv.

Why remove a feature that made the device worth getting/recommending!?

The app essentially replicates the functionality of the Android TV and Android tablet apps. While I haven’t seen its previous versions or why some are dissatisfied with the changes, in its current state, it meets all of my expectations. It supports windowed mode, cinema mode, and resizable viewports. In my opinion, it’s an excellent app that provides a great experience for viewing content in high quality.

I for the life of me cannot understand why you would remove such a beloved feature of your application. The illusion of being in a movie theater was an amazing feature. Prime movies became my go to mostly for this reason. Read the room and correct what was absolutely a brain dead decision.

Absolutely terrible app now, the app used to be absolutely brilliant, they've now ruined it, no different to watching prime on phone or tv, used to be an experience, uninstall uninstalling now, no sense wasting memory on my headset

So, it's basically a 2D prime video app. Which in my opinion, is not a bad thing. 

I see a ton of reviews of people upset over the update removing virtual environments. 

While I can see the appeal, for me, if I'm looking for that set up, nothing beats big screen. So I'd just go there if that's what I'm feeling.

But in most cases, I'd prefer to watch movies using the browser in passthrough so I can remain connected with my environment. That's what you get here but with the ability to download movies for offline viewing which is great for use while traveling.
What a awful decision this was. Prime had a great app. Nice big screen you could move around.  Now it suckkssssss

All the reviews are 1 star and that’s crazy like it’s just an app to watch you’re movies and shows I’ll spend like 6 hours watching stuff on it and not notice anything wrong with it
BRING BACK THE OLD APP!!!

reviews.review_title: Big downgrade! please bring back vr
reviews.review_description:
I was very disappointed to find out that this new app is Terrible 
They completely removed the vr experience with this "upgrade" they got rid of the theater (that was my favorite part of prime video vr also that is the exact feature that sold me on a quest 3)
The video quality seams to be worse than the old app with no way to improve it.
The settings menu is really frustrating to navigate because there is no back button so when you click on a setting you need to go back to your home then back into settings to change something else.
There is no easy way to go back to home while you are watching something you need to open a drop down menu to exit playing videos. There should be a simple easy access button to leave your show 
If I could use the old app and ignore this one I would 
I will likely just watch prime video from the browser because the experience is that same (2D window) and the quality is better and easier to navigate.
Please bring back vr so I can enjoy prime video on quest again 🙏 
(THE TLDR: new app sucks just use the browser to watch prime video)
What a downgrade
